requirement_topic.en: Morocco Market Access — Import Conformity (CMIM-Type Attestation), In-Country Importer, and ANRT Coverage
requirement_topic.zh: 摩洛哥市场准入——进口符合性（CMIM类型认证）、当地进口商及ANRT覆盖
requirement_topic.zht: 摩洛哥市場准入——進口符合性（CMIM類型認證）、當地進口商及ANRT覆蓋

summary.en: Placing portable lithium batteries or power banks on the Moroccan market requires: (1) Import conformity — regulated electrical products must clear the Ministry of Industry and Trade conformity-control regime at import; for many product families this is satisfied by an attestation/certificate of conformity (the CMIM-type conformity mark and certificate framework operated under the Ministry), evidenced by a recognised IEC/NM test report. (2) An in-country importer — a non-resident manufacturer cannot import directly; goods must be brought in by a Morocco-established importer of record who holds the conformity documentation, handles customs clearance at Casablanca or Tanger Med, and is the party answerable to the authorities. (3) ANRT coverage — where the product has wireless functions, valid ANRT agrément must be in place. (4) Customs documentation — invoice, certificate of origin, conformity attestation, and UN 38.3 transport report for the lithium batteries. Morocco does NOT impose an EU-style authorised representative, per-country battery EPR, or WEEE registration.
summary.zh: 将便携式锂电池或移动电源投放摩洛哥市场须满足：（1）进口符合性——受管制电气产品在进口时须通过工业和贸易部的符合性控制制度；许多产品类别通过符合性证明/证书满足（即该部运行的CMIM类型符合性标志及证书框架），以认可的IEC/NM测试报告为依据。（2）当地进口商——非居民制造商不可直接进口；货物须由在摩洛哥设立的进口记录方引入，由其持有符合性文件、在卡萨布兰卡或丹吉尔地中海港办理清关，并对当局负责。（3）ANRT覆盖——若产品含无线功能，须具备有效ANRT agrément。（4）海关文件——发票、原产地证书、符合性证明，以及锂电池的UN 38.3运输报告。摩洛哥不施加欧盟式授权代表、按国家电池EPR或WEEE注册。
summary.zht: 將便攜式鋰電池或行動電源投放摩洛哥市場須滿足：（1）進口符合性——受管制電氣產品在進口時須通過工業和貿易部的符合性控制制度；許多產品類別透過符合性證明/證書滿足（即該部運行的CMIM類型符合性標誌及證書框架），以認可的IEC/NM測試報告為依據。（2）當地進口商——非居民製造商不可直接進口；貨物須由在摩洛哥設立的進口記錄方引入，由其持有符合性文件、在卡薩布蘭卡或丹吉爾地中海港辦理清關，並對當局負責。（3）ANRT覆蓋——若產品含無線功能，須具備有效ANRT agrément。（4）海關文件——發票、原產地證書、符合性證明，以及鋰電池的UN 38.3運輸報告。摩洛哥不施加歐盟式授權代表、按國家電池EPR或WEEE登記。

standards_or_laws: Ministry of Industry and Trade import-conformity control regime — attestation/CMIM-type certificate of conformity for regulated electrical products
Law No. 24-09 on the safety of products and services — Morocco general product-safety and conformity framework
Moroccan Customs (Administration des Douanes et Impôts Indirects, ADII) import clearance requirements — Casablanca / Tanger Med
ANRT equipment agrément — required where wireless functions are present

summary.en: China's domestic market access uses CCC (China Compulsory Certification, CNCA/SAMR), mandatory for certain rechargeable battery categories sold domestically (e.g. mobile-phone lithium batteries). CCC is a Chinese domestic requirement and is NOT recognised by Morocco; it does not substitute for the Moroccan import-conformity attestation. Chinese manufacturers selling domestically do not appoint any foreign importer or representative. There is no Chinese equivalent of Morocco's import-conformity attestation, no Chinese obligation to ship through a Moroccan importer, and no Chinese counterpart to ANRT approval for foreign markets. Like Morocco, China imposes no EU-style per-country battery EPR or WEEE registration on exporters.
summary.zh: 中国国内市场准入采用CCC（中国强制认证，CNCA/SAMR），对某些国内销售的可充电电池类别（如手机锂电池）为强制性。CCC属中国国内要求，不被摩洛哥认可，不可替代摩洛哥进口符合性认证。国内销售的中国制造商不任命任何境外进口商或代表。中国没有等同于摩洛哥进口符合性认证的制度，没有须经摩洛哥进口商发货的义务，也没有针对境外市场的ANRT核准对应制度。与摩洛哥相同，中国不对出口商施加欧盟式按国家电池EPR或WEEE注册。
summary.zht: 中國國內市場准入採用CCC（中國強制認證，CNCA/SAMR），對某些國內銷售的可充電電池類別（如手機鋰電池）為強制性。CCC屬中國國內要求，不被摩洛哥認可，不可替代摩洛哥進口符合性認證。國內銷售的中國製造商不任命任何境外進口商或代表。中國沒有等同於摩洛哥進口符合性認證的制度，沒有須經摩洛哥進口商發貨的義務，也沒有針對境外市場的ANRT核准對應制度。與摩洛哥相同，中國不對出口商施加歐盟式按國家電池EPR或WEEE登記。

standards_or_laws: CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA/SAMR) — domestic China market access only; not recognised in Morocco
PRC customs import/export declaration regime — domestic export documentation

gap.en: Chinese exporters face three Morocco-specific market-access gaps, but notably FEWER than for the EU: (1) Import-conformity attestation — the Ministry of Industry regime requires a recognised IEC/NM-based conformity certificate; a CCC certificate (Chinese domestic) is not transferable and does not satisfy it; (2) In-country importer of record — there is no direct-export route, so the exporter must contract a Morocco-established importer who holds the conformity file, clears customs at Casablanca/Tanger Med, and answers to the authorities; (3) ANRT agrément where wireless functions exist. There is NO Moroccan equivalent of an EU authorised representative, NO per-country battery EPR registration, and NO WEEE registration obligation — so the recurring annual EPR/WEEE cost burden that exists for the EU does not arise. The main upfront cost is the conformity attestation plus (if wireless) ANRT approval.
gap.zh: 中国出口商面临三项摩洛哥特有的市场准入差距，但明显少于欧盟：（1）进口符合性认证——工业部制度要求基于IEC/NM的认可符合性证书；CCC证书（中国国内）不可转移且不能满足；（2）当地进口记录方——无直接出口路径，出口商须签约在摩洛哥设立的进口商，由其持有符合性文件、在卡萨布兰卡/丹吉尔地中海港清关并对当局负责；（3）含无线功能时的ANRT agrément。摩洛哥没有欧盟式授权代表的对应制度，没有按国家电池EPR注册，也没有WEEE注册义务——因此欧盟存在的每年EPR/WEEE经常性费用负担在此不出现。主要前期成本为符合性认证，以及（如含无线）ANRT核准。
gap.zht: 中國出口商面臨三項摩洛哥特有的市場准入差距，但明顯少於歐盟：（1）進口符合性認證——工業部制度要求基於IEC/NM的認可符合性證書；CCC證書（中國國內）不可轉移且不能滿足；（2）當地進口記錄方——無直接出口路徑，出口商須簽約在摩洛哥設立的進口商，由其持有符合性文件、在卡薩布蘭卡/丹吉爾地中海港清關並對當局負責；（3）含無線功能時的ANRT agrément。摩洛哥沒有歐盟式授權代表的對應制度，沒有按國家電池EPR登記，也沒有WEEE登記義務——因此歐盟存在的每年EPR/WEEE經常性費用負擔在此不出現。主要前期成本為符合性認證，以及（如含無線）ANRT核准。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Ministry of Industry import-conformity attestation (CMIM-type certificate of conformity) and an in-country importer of record are required before market placement; ANRT agrément mandatory where wireless functions exist; no EU-style authorised representative, battery EPR, or WEEE registration applies
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory for domestically-sold products in applicable categories; no equivalent of Morocco import-conformity attestation, in-country importer requirement, or ANRT approval applies to Chinese exporters under Chinese law

source.publisher: Administration des Douanes et Impôts Indirects (ADII) — Moroccan Customs

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Moroccan market access for Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters rests on three obligations: a Ministry of Industry import-conformity attestation (CMIM-type certificate, backed by an IEC/NM test report), an in-country Moroccan importer of record who clears customs at Casablanca/Tanger Med, and ANRT agrément for any wireless function. CCC certification does not transfer. Unlike the EU, Morocco imposes no authorised representative, no per-country battery EPR, and no WEEE registration, so the ongoing compliance burden is lighter and concentrated in the upfront conformity attestation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国锂电池及移动电源出口商的摩洛哥市场准入依赖三项义务：工业部进口符合性认证（CMIM类型证书，以IEC/NM测试报告为依据）、在卡萨布兰卡/丹吉尔地中海港清关的当地摩洛哥进口记录方，以及任何无线功能的ANRT agrément。CCC认证不可转移。与欧盟不同，摩洛哥不施加授权代表、按国家电池EPR或WEEE注册，故持续合规负担较轻，主要集中于前期符合性认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國鋰電池及行動電源出口商的摩洛哥市場准入依賴三項義務：工業部進口符合性認證（CMIM類型證書，以IEC/NM測試報告為依據）、在卡薩布蘭卡/丹吉爾地中海港清關的當地摩洛哥進口記錄方，以及任何無線功能的ANRT agrément。CCC認證不可轉移。與歐盟不同，摩洛哥不施加授權代表、按國家電池EPR或WEEE登記，故持續合規負擔較輕，主要集中於前期符合性認證。
